glosses.zh-Hans: 智力; 知识分子阶层
glosses.yue: 智力; 知識分子階層

sentences.target: Ich bewundere ihre Intelligenz jeden Tag.

translations.de: Ich bewundere ihre Intelligenz jeden Tag.
translations.en: I admire her intelligence every day.
translations.es: Admiro su inteligencia todos los días.
translations.fr: J’admire son intelligence tous les jours.
translations.it: Ammiro la sua intelligenza ogni giorno.
translations.zh-Hans: 我每天都钦佩她的聪明才智。
translations.yue: 我每日都佩服佢嘅聰明。
translations.ru: Я каждый день восхищаюсь её умом.
translations.pt: Admiro a inteligência dela todos os dias.
translations.he: אני מעריך את החוכמה שלה כל יום.
translations.vi: Ngày nào tôi cũng ngưỡng mộ trí thông minh của cô ấy.
translations.nl: Ik bewonder haar intelligentie elke dag.
translations.hi: मैं हर दिन उसकी बुद्धिमत्ता की प्रशंसा करता हूँ.
translations.el: Θαυμάζω την ευφυΐα της κάθε μέρα.
translations.nb: Jeg beundrer intelligensen hennes hver dag.
translations.sv: Jag beundrar hennes intelligens varje dag.
translations.ro: Îi admir inteligența în fiecare zi.
translations.da: Jeg beundrer hendes intelligens hver dag.
translations.ja: 彼女の知性には毎日感心する。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; selects an accusative object and allows temporal adverbials.
Possessive determiner modifying 'Intelligenz'; feminine accusative singular; marks possession.
Common noun, feminine, accusative singular; direct object of 'bewundere'.
Quantifying determiner, masculine accusative singular modifying 'Tag'; forms a temporal adverbial.
Common noun, masculine, accusative singular; head of the temporal NP 'jeden Tag' functioning as adverbial.

sentences.target: Seine Intelligenz hilft ihm in Mathe.

translations.de: Seine Intelligenz hilft ihm in Mathe.
translations.en: His intelligence helps him in math.
translations.es: Su inteligencia le ayuda con las matemáticas.
translations.it: La sua intelligenza lo aiuta in matematica.
translations.zh-Hans: 他的聪明在数学上对他有帮助。
translations.yue: 佢嘅聰明喺數學方面幫到佢。
translations.ru: Его ум помогает ему в математике.
translations.pt: A inteligência dele o ajuda em matemática.
translations.vi: Sự thông minh của cậu ấy giúp cậu ấy trong môn Toán.
translations.nl: Zijn intelligentie helpt hem met wiskunde.
translations.uk: Його розум допомагає йому в математиці.
translations.hu: Az intelligenciája segít neki a matekban.
translations.hi: उसकी बुद्धिमत्ता उसे गणित में मदद करती है.
translations.pl: Jego inteligencja pomaga mu w matematyce.
translations.el: Η ευφυΐα του τον βοηθά στα μαθηματικά.
translations.nb: Intelligensen hans hjelper ham med matematikk.
translations.sv: Hans intelligens hjälper honom i matematik.
translations.ro: Inteligența lui îl ajută la matematică.
translations.cs: Jeho inteligence mu pomáhá v matematice.
translations.da: Hans intelligens hjælper ham med matematik.
translations.ja: 彼の知性は数学に役立っている。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'Intelligenz'; feminine nominative singular; part of the subject NP.
Common noun, feminine, nominative singular; subject of 'hilft'.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes a dative object and a PP complement.
3rd person singular dative personal pronoun; indirect object/beneficiary of 'hilft'.
Preposition governing dative in a static sense; introduces a domain PP.
Common noun (school subject), dative (no article expressed); object of the preposition 'in'; specifies domain.

sentences.target: Wir testen unsere Intelligenz mit Rätseln.

translations.de: Wir testen unsere Intelligenz mit Rätseln.
translations.en: We test our intelligence with puzzles.
translations.es: Ponemos a prueba nuestra inteligencia con acertijos.
translations.fr: Nous mettons notre intelligence à l’épreuve avec des énigmes.
translations.it: Mettiamo alla prova la nostra intelligenza con dei rompicapo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们用谜题来测试自己的智力。
translations.yue: 我哋用謎題嚟測試我哋嘅智力。
translations.ru: Мы проверяем свой ум с помощью головоломок.
translations.he: אנחנו בוחנים את האינטליגנציה שלנו עם חידות.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi kiểm tra trí thông minh của mình bằng các câu đố.
translations.nl: We testen onze intelligentie met puzzels.
translations.uk: Ми перевіряємо свій інтелект за допомогою головоломок.
translations.hi: हम पहेलियों से अपनी बुद्धिमत्ता की परीक्षा लेते हैं.
translations.pl: Sprawdzamy naszą inteligencję za pomocą zagadek.
translations.el: Δοκιμάζουμε την ευφυΐα μας με γρίφους.
translations.nb: Vi tester intelligensen vår med gåter.
translations.id: Kami menguji kecerdasan kami dengan teka-teki.
translations.sv: Vi testar vår intelligens med gåtor.
translations.da: Vi tester vores intelligens med gåder.
translations.ja: パズルで自分たちの知性を試す。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural nominative personal pronoun; subject.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive, selecting an accusative object and allowing an instrumental PP.
Possessive determiner modifying 'Intelligenz'; feminine accusative singular.
Common noun, feminine, accusative singular; direct object of 'testen'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces an instrumental/comitative PP.
Common noun, dative plural; object of 'mit'; expresses the means ('with puzzles').

sentences.target: Die Intelligenz unserer Katze überrascht mich.

translations.de: Die Intelligenz unserer Katze überrascht mich.
translations.es: La inteligencia de nuestro gato me sorprende.
translations.fr: L’intelligence de notre chat me surprend.
translations.it: L’intelligenza del nostro gatto mi sorprende.
translations.ko: 우리 고양이의 지능이 나를 놀라게 해.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们家猫的聪明让我很惊讶。
translations.yue: 我哋隻貓嘅聰明令我好驚訝。
translations.pt: A inteligência do nosso gato me surpreende.
translations.he: האינטליגנציה של החתול שלנו מפתיעה אותי.
translations.vi: Sự thông minh của con mèo nhà chúng tôi khiến tôi ngạc nhiên.
translations.nl: De intelligentie van onze kat verbaast me.
translations.hi: हमारी बिल्ली की बुद्धिमत्ता मुझे हैरान करती है.
translations.el: Η ευφυΐα της γάτας μας με εκπλήσσει.
translations.nb: Intelligensen til katten vår overrasker meg.
translations.id: Kecerdasan kucing kami membuat saya heran.
translations.ja: うちの猫の賢さには驚かされる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine nominative singular; determiner of the subject NP.
Common noun, feminine, nominative singular; head of the subject; takes a genitive attribute.
Possessive determiner, genitive feminine singular; modifies 'Katze' inside the genitive attribute.
Common noun, feminine, genitive singular; dependent in the genitive attribute linked to 'Intelligenz' (possessor).
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes an accusative object.
1st person singular accusative personal pronoun; direct object/experiencer of 'überrascht'.
